title: Sweet Smoked Portuguese Paella
description: A sweet and smoky paella dish featuring chicken, shellfish, and vegetables, all wrapped in a banana leaf.
instructions: Heat the lard in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Sear the chicken thighs until browned, then set aside.
Add the mussels and shrimp to the pan and cook until they start to release their liquid.
Add the onion, garlic, and tomato to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the chicken broth, white wine, and sweet smoked paprika to the pan and bring to a boil.
Add the chicken back to the pan and stir to combine.
Cover the pan with a large piece of parchment paper and cook for 20 minutes.
Remove the parchment paper and top the paella with the laminated puff pastry.
Fold the banana leaves over the top of the pastry to create a package.
Cook for an additional 15 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
